name: UBA : External User Failed Mailbox Login
notes: Detects repeated failures to log in to mailbox from an external user.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Office 365
when the event QID is one of the following (101250316) MailboxLogin-failed
when any of ExternalAccess (custom) match false
when at least 3 events are seen with the same Username, Event Name in 2 minutes
thresholds: when at least 3 events are seen with the same Username, Event Name in 2 minutes
TD_list: APPLY UBA : External User Failed Mailbox Login on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Office 365
AND when the event QID is one of the following (101250316) MailboxLogin-failed
AND NOT when any of ExternalAccess (custom) match false
AND when at least 3 events are seen with the same Username, Event Name in 2 minutes
RED_list: Event name: UBA : External User Failed Mailbox Login
